examples: Of the 44 patients, 50% also received adjunctive therapy with memantine.
Additional data are needed on selection and dosing of adjunctive therapies and on complications in the elderly.
Experience has been gathered using LMWHs as an adjunctive therapy with thrombolytics for acute myocardial infarction.
Celebrex is approved as an adjunctive therapy for a hereditary disorder called Familial Adenomatous Polyptosis (FAP), which causes colon polyps to appear with alarming frequency.
